Let’s Connect ♡

You take care of everyone else.

Let me help you become a priority. ♡

I see the woman who keeps showing up for everybody. The one who wants to feel strong, energized, confident, and proud of herself again. My Fitness Bestie helps women 35+ build sustainable healthy habits, simple wellness strategies, and personalized fitness coaching that fits real life.

Let Today Be Your Turning Point ♡
♡
Because
YOU
matter
too. ♡

You can’t pour from an empty cup.

For too long, you may have been giving your best energy to everyone else and saving the smallest pieces for yourself.

But the goal is not to give from your last drops. The goal is to fill your cup so fully that you pour into the people you love from the overflow.

Your saucer is the overflow. That is where your energy, patience, confidence, and joy get to spill into your family, your work, and your life.

Fill your cup. Overflow your saucer.

That’s where real change begins. ♡

You don’t have to become a priority alone.

~~~

This is coaching that meets you with encouragement, structure, and real-life strategy. No shame. No all-or-nothing pressure. Just steady support that helps you feel like yourself again.

♡

Sustainable Healthy Habits

Real life. Real results. Habits that fit your life, not the other way around.

✦

Stronger Body, Stronger You

Build strength, confidence, and trust in what your body can do.

✿

More Energy Everyday

Hello energy for the people, places, and things you love.

☾

Balance That Feels Good

Health, family, fun, and YOU. Yes, it gets to be possible.

☆

A Life You Love Living

More than a goal. It is a lifestyle you are excited to wake up to.

Built Around Your Life.

This is not a copy-and-paste workout.

Most fitness programs start with a workout.

I start with you.

Before I create your plan, I take the time to learn about your life, your goals, your schedule, your equipment, your experience level, and the obstacles standing in your way.

♡ Your goals ♡ Your schedule ♡ Your equipment ♡ Your limitations ♡ Your experience ♡ Your real life

Because the best plan in the world will not help if it does not fit the life you are actually living.

Whether you are balancing work, family, caregiving, travel, injuries, limited equipment, or simply trying to find time for yourself again, your plan is designed with those realities in mind.

Instead of forcing your life to fit a program, you get a program built around your life. ♡

Hi, I’m Stacie

  • Mom of Three
  • Certified Personal Trainer
  • Women’s Fitness Specialist
  • Coffee Lover
  • Believer in Progress Over Perfection

I’m here to cheer you on, hold you accountable, and help you create a life where YOU come first without the guilt.

You deserve this. ♡

YOU deserve to feel strong, confident, and happy in your own skin.

Let Today Be Your Turning Point. ♡
